message:
fix: seed context manager with snapshot token count on resume

On RestoreSession, the context manager was created with lastInputTokens=0.
estimatePressure fell back to the char/4 heuristic which severely
underestimates for long conversations with cached prompts. Auto-compact
never fired because the pressure looked low.

Fix: after initSessionState, call RecordInputTokens with the snapshot's
LastInputTokens so the very first MaybeCompact check on the resumed
session sees accurate pressure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
